subcodes.first_line: O kind friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! For some time now, this wanderer's heart hath been weighed down by the calamities that have befallen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان عبدالبهاء چندی بود که خاطر این آواره از بلایای وارده بر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for gatherings; meetings; assemblies, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
